summary: Completed frontend testing of all major user flows on The Doggy Company preview. All reported issues have been verified as FIXED: Pet page handles missing pets gracefully with 'Pet Not Found' message (not crash), Adopt page loads correctly with 5 pets available, Dashboard redirects to login for unauthenticated users and shows full dashboard after login. All pillar pages (Care, Travel, Stay, Dine, Celebrate, Shop, Adopt) load correctly without errors.

homepage_loads.details: Homepage loads correctly with 'The Doggy Company | Pet Life Operating System' title, navigation bar, and main content visible

navigation_links.details: All pillar navigation links work: Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, Enjoy, Fit, Learn, Paperwork, Advisory, Emergency, Farewell, Adopt, Shop

dashboard_page.details: Dashboard redirects to /login for unauthenticated users. After login with dipali@clubconcierge.in, shows full dashboard with pet 'Mojo' (100% Pet Soul), 4 pets, achievements, and all account features

adopt_page.details: Adopt page loads correctly with hero section, 5 Pets Available, 4 adoption categories (Rescue, Shelter, Foster, Events), 'Meet Our Adoptable Pets' section with filters

pet_profile_missing_pet.details: Pet page with non-existent ID shows graceful 'Pet Not Found' message with AlertCircle icon and 'Back to My Pets' button - NOT ErrorBoundary crash. This was the reported bug and it's FIXED.

login_flow.details: Login with dipali@clubconcierge.in / lola4304 works correctly. Redirects to /dashboard after successful login.

register_page.details: Register page loads with 'Join The Pack' form: Full Name, Email, Phone Number, Password fields, Google sign-up option, and 'Create Account' button

admin_login.details: Admin login at /admin with aditya/lola4304 works. Shows 'TDB Admin - Welcome, Aditya' dashboard with all admin tools including Service Desk, Orders, Products, etc.

service_desk_access.details: Service Desk at /admin/service-desk loads with its own login form (two-step authentication). Full-screen workspace mode available.

shop_page.details: Shop page loads with 418 products, category filters (All Products, Food & Nutrition, Treats & Snacks, etc.), price range filter, and product grid

care_page.details: Care pillar page loads with 'Care That Knows Your Pet' hero, care services (Grooming, Walks & Sitting, Training, Vet Coordination, Emergency Help, Special Needs Care)

travel_page.details: Travel pillar page loads with 'Adventures Begin Together' hero, travel types (Cab/Road, Train/Bus, Domestic Flight, Pet Relocation)

stay_page.details: Stay pillar page loads with 32 Pet-Friendly Stays, search filters (All Cities, All Types, Any Rating), category tags (Beach, Mountain, Forest, Luxury, etc.)

dine_page.details: Dine pillar page loads with Fresh Pet Meals section, Pet Buddy Meetups feature, Pet-Friendly Restaurants search

celebrate_page.details: Celebrate page loads with 208 products (Birthday Cakes), filters, and product grid showing cakes with prices

critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedPetPage.jsx correctly handles missing pet with graceful error state (lines 460-472) - shows 'Pet Not Found' card instead of crashing
ErrorBoundary.jsx is properly implemented and wraps the entire app, but individual page error handling prevents it from being triggered for expected errors like missing pets
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major user flows verified working on preview. Pet page error handling is correct - shows 'Pet Not Found' for missing pets instead of ErrorBoundary crash. User reported issues appear to be resolved. Dashboard shows user 'Dipali' with pet 'Mojo' who has 100% Pet Soul completion and 4 pets total. Admin dashboard accessible with full feature set including Service Desk (requires two-step login).

verified_user_reported_issues.pet_page_error: FIXED - Shows 'Pet Not Found' gracefully, not ErrorBoundary crash
verified_user_reported_issues.dashboard_not_linking: FIXED - Dashboard redirects to login for unauthenticated, shows full dashboard after login
verified_user_reported_issues.adopt_page_not_loading: FIXED - Adopt page loads correctly with 5 pets available and all features
